- 优化媒体库扫描，减少大量视频首次整理时的等待
- 显示视频内嵌封面，并让大型 MKV 更稳定地生成缩略图
- 让横屏视频打开时直接进入横屏，避免先竖屏加载再旋转
- 修复部分冷启动点进视频后停在缓冲、没有自动播放的问题
- 添加视频镜像播放开关

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Optimize media library scanning to reduce waiting when organizing large video collections
- Show embedded video artwork and make thumbnails for large MKV files more reliable
- Open landscape videos directly in landscape instead of loading in portrait first
- Fix some cold starts where opening a video stayed buffering instead of autoplaying
- Add a video mirror playback toggle

</details>
